haiku:
Petals dance in breeze,
Fragrant blooms paint the earth bright,
Joyful hearts unite.
Happy #NationalOrangeBlossomDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Bright skies all around,
Laughter dances on the breeze,
Shadows play with light.
Happy #SunglassesDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Joyful voices sing,
Colors dance in bright delight,
Hearts unite in cheer.
#HappyBirthdayHelenKeller from @ClamBakeSanta
